name: tv.tootie/arcane-rmcp
title: Arcane MCP
description: MCP server for Arcane Docker management — manage containers, images, networks, volumes, compose projects, GitOps, and vulnerability findings.

environmentVariables.name: RARCANE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Arcane API server, e.g. https://arcane.example.com.

environmentVariables.name: RARCANE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key or bearer token for authenticating to the upstream Arcane API.

environmentVariables.name: RARCANE_MCP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP endpoint authentication. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32.
